segments.speaker: CHAIRPERSON
segments.en: So next on the agenda is 'Proposals for improvements to the recreation ground'.
segments.zh: 接下来议程是‘关于改善休闲场地的提案’。再次请桑顿议员发言。

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: Well, since we managed to extend the recreation ground, we've spent some time talking to local people about how it could be made a more attractive and useful space.
segments.zh: 嗯，自从我们成功扩建了休闲场地后，我们花了一些时间与当地居民讨论如何让它变得更吸引人、更实用。请看屏幕上的地图，北边是河流，靠近道路入口处是社区大厅。目前，汽车可以停在社区大厅和东边那排树之间，但这对于行人来说相当危险，所以我们建议在社区大厅的另一侧紧挨着它建一个新停车场。我们还有了板球场的新位置。由于我们现在购买了休闲场地东边、树丛以外的额外空间，我们计划将其从目前靠近道路的位置移到树线以外的这个新区域。这样一来，飞球击中汽车或行人的风险就降低了。我们计划建一个儿童游乐场，从社区大厅通过一条步行道即可到达，并且紧邻河边。我们最初考虑把它建在靠近道路的地方，但认为这个位置会更吸引人。滑板坡道很受大孩子和小孩子的欢迎——我们曾考虑把它移到河边，但最终决定把它放在靠近道路的东南角。目前，足球运动员和板球运动员都经常使用场馆。它将保持现在的位置——在树线的左侧，靠近河边——方便前往足球场和板球场。最后，我们将增设一个新的公告栏用于发布本地信息，它就在人们从道路进入休闲场地时的右手边。

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: If you have a look at the map on the screen, you can see the river up in the north, and the Community Hall near the entrance from the road.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: At present, cars can park between the Community Hall and that line of trees to the east, but this is quite dangerous for pedestrians so we're suggesting a new car park on the opposite side of the Community Hall, right next to it.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: We also have a new location for the cricket pitch.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: As we've now purchased additional space to the east of the recreation ground, beyond the trees, we plan to move it away from its current location, which is rather near the road, into this new area beyond the line of trees.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: This means there's less danger of stray balls hitting cars or pedestrians.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: We've got plans for a children's playground which will be accessible by a footpath from the Community Hall and will be alongside the river.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: We'd originally thought of having it close to the road, but we think this will be a more attractive location.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: The skateboard ramp is very popular with both younger and older children – we had considered moving this up towards the river, but in the end we decided to have it in the southeast corner near the road.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: The pavilion is very well used at present by both football players and cricketers.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: It will stay where it is now – to the left of the line of trees and near to the river – handy for both the football and cricket pitches.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: And finally, we'll be getting a new notice board for local information, and that will be directly on people's right as they go from the road into the recreation ground.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Now that we've done all the research into bike-sharing schemes in cities around the world, we need to think about how we're going to organise our report.
segments.zh: 既然我们已经完成了对世界各地城市共享单车计划的研究，我们需要考虑如何组织我们的报告。

segments.speaker: AMY
segments.zh: 对。我认为我们应该先谈谈好处。我的意思是，这么多城市都推出了这些计划，任何人都可以从几十个不同地点取一辆自行车，租用几个小时，这真是太棒了。这让人们骑自行车变得非常方便。

segments.speaker: AMY
segments.en: I think we should start by talking about the benefits.

segments.speaker: AMY
segments.en: I mean it's great that so many cities have introduced these schemes where anyone can pick up a bike from dozens of different locations and hire it for a few hours.

segments.speaker: AMY
segments.en: It makes riding a bike very convenient for people.

items.prompt: A survey found people's main concern about traffic in the area was
Which change will shortly be made to the cycle path next to the river?
Plans for a pedestrian crossing have been postponed because
On Station Road, notices have been erected

pairs.note: 题干和原文几乎一致，只是冠词不同。

pairs.p: on the opposite side of the Community Hall, right next to it
pairs.note: 原文用位置描述具体说明新停车场在哪里，帮助定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问新停车场的位置，原文提到新停车场在社区大厅对面紧挨着，对应选项C。

pairs.p: new location for the cricket pitch
pairs.note: 题干 'New cricket pitch' 对应原文 'new location for the cricket pitch'，其中 'new' 和 'cricket pitch' 完全一致。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 'New cricket pitch' 的位置，定位句提到 'new location for the cricket pitch' 并说明它被移到 'beyond the line of trees' 的新区域，对应地图上的 F 区域。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。
原文明确说明儿童游乐场将沿着河边，与地图位置对应。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问儿童游乐场的位置，原文提到'We've got plans for a children's playground which will be accessible by a footpath from the Community Hall and will be alongside the river.'，由此定位到地图上的河边位置，对应选项A。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。
原文用'have it in the southeast corner near the road'说明位置，对应题干隐含的'位置'。

paraphrase.explain: 题干是'Skateboard ramp'，原文直接提到'skateboard ramp'，然后说'decided to have it in the southeast corner near the road'，所以定位到地图上的东南角，即选项I。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全相同的词，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干关键词'Pavilion'在原文中直接出现，通过定位该词找到描述其位置的信息。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的'Notice board'在原文末尾出现，且描述位置为'直接在人右边进入时'，对应地图上的H位置。
